_comment: 3-station DOA config for 17 May 2024 LSTID event. AC0G_ND unusable (E-region loops + dead zone 16:00-19:30 UTC). Window 17:30-20:30 UTC confirmed by spectrogram inspection. See FINDINGS Entry 44.

_subchannel_notes.W7LUX: subchannel 0, 10 MHz — clean sinusoidal TID, best station
_subchannel_notes.AC0G_ND: subchannel 4, 10 MHz — unusable (E-region loops + dead zone)

_max_lag_note: 20 min — tightest safe value; true lags ~18-19 min, excludes aliased -40 min peaks
